name: Fattoush
intro: The lemony taste of sumac is hard to beat. The spice is an essential component of this traditional Middle Eastern dish, along with sweet pomegranate syrup and crisp toasted flatbread.

ingredients.item: red or green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
small bunch of flat-leaf parsley, coarsely chopped
thin flatbreads, such as pita breads
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Arrange the lettuce leaves, tomatoes, peppers, and scallions in a wide, shallow bowl and sprinkle over the parsley. Lightly toast the flatbreads, break them into bite-sized pieces, and scatter them over the salad.

In a small bowl, combine the oil and lemon juice with the garlic and cumin seeds. Season well and pour over the salad. Drizzle the salad with the pomegranate syrup and sprinkle over the sumac. Toss the salad gently just before serving.
